items.title: Senior Year (12th standard) Indian students Rickrolled en masse by QR code in finals exam.
items.dek: This is arguably the largest and most critical board exam in the school system. The QR authentication code appeared in the Math question paper. submitted by /u/
items.body: This is arguably the largest and most critical board exam in the school system. The QR authentication code appeared in the Math question paper. submitted by /u/AisleSeatJunkie [link] [comments]

items.title: China exports surge in first two months of the year despite Trump tariffs
items.dek: The jump in shipments puts the world's second largest economy on track to top the record-breaking annual trade surplus it saw in 2025.
items.body: The jump in shipments puts the world's second largest economy on track to top the record-breaking annual trade surplus it saw in 2025.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Two men charged with terror offences after homemade bomb thrown outside NYC mayor's home
items.dek: The city's police commissioner said one of the suspects said he wanted the attack to be "even larger" than the Boston Marathon bombing.
items.body: The city's police commissioner said one of the suspects said he wanted the attack to be "even larger" than the Boston Marathon bombing.
items.author: IriLine Desk
